heading: Coordination with General Services Administration
label: 2456 Coordination with General Services Administration
text: To avoid unnecessary duplication, the Administrator of General Services and the Secretary of Defense shall coordinate the cataloging and standardization activities of the General Services Administration and the Department of Defense.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)24565:173i., .July 1, 1952, ch. 539, § 1166 Stat. 320
